creator: muir@idiom.com
text:
getty doesn't notice when someone is trying to speack
	PPP protocols rather than loging in.

Fix: While it would be nice to totally rewrite getty, the following
smallish change will do the trick.   All of the fax-getty programs
need to be changed too.  
How-To-Repeat: 
	Try to talk PPP to Navigator Personal Edition for Windows
